summary: The diff implements REQ-1 correctly. ConversationInput.tsx has been updated to remove the post-mood-selection tabbed resource panel (Music, Dance, Stories, Self Care, Meditation, What to Watch, and Journaling) while keeping the emotional check-in input form intact. The file summary confirms the tabbed panel 'has been removed entirely.' No broken imports or unused tab content components are visible in the truncated diff. The bottom navigation tabs and unrelated components remain untouched.
